notes: Interior furniture blocks — the home/crew-quarter pieces you place inside a ship or station. 7 entries: Bed and Toilet (both currently placeholders per the wiki's 'functionality not yet implemented' warning), Desk (WIP stub page — no infobox yet, modeled as planned with nulls), and Table/Shower/Sink/Deck Panel (all active, with functional recipes). Storage furniture (Locker 2 m, Crate 1 m, Barrel 1.25 m) lives in storage.json; cockpits and seats in cockpits.json. The Table/Shower/Sink recipes include an optional welding phase ('Steel Plate-opt=3' on the wiki source) — we model this as qtyOptional on the build-component entry so consumers can decide whether to add the extra plates for full health.
